premise: Every student at the academy is assigned a familiar on their sixteenth birthday. Rowan's familiar arrived dead. Now it follows her anyway, and the teachers pretend they can't see it.

characters.name: Rowan
characters.description: Sixteen, stubborn, too proud to ask for help. Grew up in the outer villages where magic is a rumor. Doesn't know the rules well enough to know she's breaking them.

characters.name: Sable
characters.description: Rowan's dead familiar — a fox made of shadow and static. Communicates through temperature drops and rearranged objects. Loyal in a way that frightens people.

characters.name: Instructor Vael
characters.description: Head of bonding studies. Knows exactly what Sable is and has seen it once before. The last student who bonded like this burned down a wing of the academy.
